title: Pinkwave Sky Overlay
description: A synthwave sky overlay depicting a pink retrowave-themed sky
body:
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/771a0f08a10024abf25bbaf717133414c08c74e8.png)
### What is this resource pack?
This resource pack is an overlay which replaces the default minecraft sky with a different sky.

---

### Requirements
- Needs [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) OR [FabricSkyboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes)
- Custom Sky should be turned on (IF USING ON OPTIFINE)
- Stars / Sun and Moon should be turned on (IF USING ON OPTIFINE)

---

### How to use this resource pack?
This is compatible with all other resource packs, just make sure you put it on top of the one you are already using.
